# AI-IDEI LLM Context File
# See https://llmstxt.org/ for specification

> AI-IDEI is an AI-driven expertise capitalization platform that transforms raw knowledge (podcasts, interviews, texts) into structured intellectual assets.

## Core Concepts

- **Neurons**: Atomic knowledge units extracted from content — frameworks, patterns, formulas, rhetorical structures
- **Services**: AI workflows that combine neurons to generate deliverables (articles, courses, marketing funnels)
- **Knowledge Graph**: Interconnected network of insights, patterns, and entities with semantic relationships
- **IdeaRank**: PageRank-inspired scoring algorithm for knowledge entities

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://ai-idei.com/) — Platform overview
- [Extractor](https://ai-idei.com/extractor) — Upload and extract knowledge from content
- [Intelligence](https://ai-idei.com/intelligence) — Knowledge graph visualization
- [Services](https://ai-idei.com/services) — AI service catalog (120+ extractors)
- [Marketplace](https://ai-idei.com/marketplace) — Knowledge asset marketplace
- [Library](https://ai-idei.com/library) — Personal neuron library
- [Community](https://ai-idei.com/community) — Forum and discussions
- [API](https://ai-idei.com/api) — Public REST API documentation
- [Documentation](https://ai-idei.com/docs) — Platform docs

## Entity Types

- **Insights** — Key takeaways and learnings
- **Patterns** — Recurring structures and templates
- **Formulas** — Copywriting and communication formulas
- **Applications** — Practical use cases
- **Contradictions** — Paradoxes and counter-intuitive findings
- **Profiles** — Psychological and expertise profiles

## API

Public REST API available at `/api/neuron-api` with JWT or API Key authentication.
Endpoints: neurons, entities, jobs, search, templates.

## Knowledge Graph

Structured knowledge graph export available as JSON-LD at `/api/knowledge-graph-export`.
Contains schema.org typed entities: Person, CreativeWork, DefinedTerm, Dataset, Organization.

## Contact

- Website: https://ai-idei.com
- Twitter: @ai_idei
